title: Stand and Deliver
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref}}

"'''Stand and Deliver'''" is an article published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] by [[John J. Richardson III]], which describes the pirate [[Drek Drednar]], his starship the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Sable III]]'' and its crew.

The pirating operations conducted by Drednar were based on [[Taraloon]].

The first mate upon [[Sable III|''Anto's Star'']], renamed ''Sable III'' was the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], [[Chillo Sanpona]]. The chief astrogator was [[Tron Nixx]]. Originally a stowaway aboard the Sable III was the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], [[Seely]] who eventually became a crew member.
